overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the character walking along a foggy waterfront promenade at night. The scene features a large suspension bridge and illuminated city skyline in the background, with the character eventually approaching and ascending a concrete stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront boardwalk with the cape flowing behind, overlooking the water

entered.detail: large illuminated bridge with red lights spanning across the water
black metal railing running along the edge of the boardwalk
illuminated skyscrapers and buildings with various colored lights against the night sky
wooden plank walkway extending along the waterfront
tall dark concrete wall with stairway entrance

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a foggy waterfront boardwalk at night, with a large suspension bridge illuminated against the dark sky on the left and the glowing Gotham city skyline on the right. The wooden planks of the promenade stretch ahead, bordered by a metal railing overlooking the water, while a stone retaining wall runs along the right side.

events.description: character transitions from walking on flat boardwalk to ascending concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing the concrete stairs leading up from the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: civilian standing still near the base of the stairs, facing the waterfront

entered.detail: wide concrete steps with metal railings leading upward from the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: Approaching a concrete stairway, Batman passes a stationary civilian standing near the entrance before beginning to ascend the steps. The suspension bridge disappears from view as the character climbs upward alongside the stone retaining wall, leaving the waterfront boardwalk behind while the city skyline remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy waterfront promenade that eventually ascends into a concrete urban elevation. It begins with Batman walking across wooden planks, flanked by a metal railing over the water and a stone retaining wall, while a glowing city skyline and an illuminated suspension bridge frame the dark night sky. As the character advances, the camera approaches a concrete stairway and passes a stationary civilian standing near the entrance. The scene then shifts upward as Batman begins to climb the steps, causing the suspension bridge to disappear from view while the stone wall continues alongside the path. Finally, the camera leaves the boardwalk behind, maintaining a view of the distant city skyline as the ascent continues.
